name: Bean Tortilla Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 Chiles (use 1/3 to 1/2 cup of canned chipotle chiles in adobo)
1/4 cup Green Onions with Tops, Sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Four 15 oz cans of pinto beans may be substituted for the water.
2. Place half the beans, 1/2 cup of bean liquid, the chipotle chiles, bouillon (dry), and cumin in a food processor work bowl fitted with steel blade or blender container. Process until smooth; pour into large bowl.
3. Place remaining beans with just enough liquid to cover in work bowl. Process until smooth; add to bean mixture in bowl.
4. Heat oil in 10-inch skillet until hot. Stir in bean mixture. Cook uncovered, stirring frequently, until mixture is consistency of cake batter.
5. Preheat oven to 350 degrees F (175 degrees C).
6. Spoon 1/4 cup chicken onto half of each tortilla; fold tortillas into halves. Arrange in greased 3-quart round shallow casserole or rectangular baking dish. Spoon bean mixture over tortillas. Top with sour cream, cheese, and green onions.
7. Bake uncovered until hot and bubbly, about 15 to 20 minutes.
